markdown:
# Simple Box

A basic rectangular box with customizable dimensions.

## Parameters

- **width**: Controls the width (X-axis) of the box
- **depth**: Controls the depth (Y-axis) of the box  
- **height**: Controls the height (Z-axis) of the box

## Customization

Adjust any of the three dimensions to create boxes of different proportions:
- Make it a **cube** by setting all three parameters equal
- Create a **flat platform** by reducing the height
- Make a **tall tower** by increasing the height

## 3D Printing Notes

This simple box is ideal for 3D printing:
- No overhangs or support needed
- Can be printed in any orientation
- Solid and structurally sound
- Consider adding wall thickness if you need a hollow box
